import requests, json, time

DATA_API = 'https://data-api.polymarket.com/v1'
TRADERS  = ['majorexploiter', 'beachboy4']

data = requests.get\(f'{DATA_API}/leaderboard', params={'timePeriod':'MONTH','orderBy':'PNL','limit':50}, timeout=10\).json\(\)
rows = data if isinstance\(data, list\) else data.get\('data', []\)
found = {}
for row in rows:
    name = row.get\('name'\) or row.get\('userName'\) or ''
    if name in TRADERS:
        found[name] = row.get\('proxyWallet',''\)

print\('Addresses found:'\)
for n,a in found.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {n}: {a}'\)

missing = [t for t in TRADERS if t not in found]
if missing:
    print\(f'NOT on leaderboard: {missing}'\)
print\('OK'\)
" 2>&1)
